title: Re-observation truncation: when content exceeds max_tokens, the runner truncates and emits re_observation_injected with truncated=true and original_size set
description: When a ReObservation declares max_tokens and the content (from shell stdout or supervisor response) exceeds it, the runner MUST truncate the injected content to fit and MUST set truncated=true and original_size on the re_observation_injected event so the trajectory captures the truncation. The original (untruncated) content is NOT recorded — only its size.

forbidden_events.label: truncated injection MUST NOT report truncated=false
